steps.title: Use the hourly expression
steps.content: The expression $14.25z$ gives Maya's earnings for $z$ hours. Working $4z$ hours means working $4$ times as many hours.

steps.title: Scale the earnings
steps.content: Because the hours are multiplied by $4$, the earnings are also multiplied by $4$. $$ 4(14.25z) $$ The answer is A.
